Selected Projects

My Work

From award-winning academic posters to brand identities, event graphics, and cinematic edits — a curated look at real projects built for real clients and competitions since 2023.

01 TISS Parivartan '25 — Award Work

Represented Utkal University at the national TISS Parivartan Poster Presentation Competition 2025. My research poster "Credit Catalyst" analysed MSME financing policy in India's Union Budget 2025-26 — winning 2nd place out of national entries.

National Award · Certificate
2nd Place — TISS Parivartan
Issued by TISS recognising Kirtiman Panda from Utkal University for winning Second Position at the Parivartan Poster Presentation on 14th November 2025. Signed by the Dean, SMLS and Chairperson, LMRF.
Poster
Research Poster · Award Winner
Credit Catalyst — MSME Policy
An award-winning research poster examining Union Budget 2025-26's impact on MSME financing. Features original bar charts, line graphs, and donut charts — all designed from scratch to communicate complex policy data with visual clarity.
02 Cables Tech — Brand Identity Kit

A futuristic, cyber-inspired brand identity for Cables Tech, utilizing a teal-and-dark-base color palette and geometric typography for structural connectivity.

03 Cables Tech — Asset Intelligence Platform

A secure, high-performance asset intelligence platform designed for seamless financial tracking, real-time analytics, and efficient, encrypted user account management.

02 Samaya Watches — Brand Identity Kit

A refined luxury watch brand identity blending ancient Indian craftsmanship with minimalist elegance, utilizing rich earthy tones and timeless typography.
